description: Style NoteJust the pair for a weekend by the pool - this pair of sandals for men from franco leone are a closet essential. Hate your claustrophobic formal shoes after a long day at work? Switch to this pair as soon as you're home. These look good with shorts, PJs or casual pants - need more reasons to snag this pair?. Product DetailsBlack textured thong style straps with rivet and metal buckle detailSoft footbed with print on the heel regionUpper adhered to the tough outsoleTPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned lugsMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
